2015, Time: 12:30pm - 3:00pm. Location: Posters in 545 Cory Hall, DOP Center . Lunch in 540A/B Cory Hall. This is part of the Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS). There are two ways to register and receive a lunch. Only register in ONE

gister and receive a lunch. Only register in ONE of the following ways: If you plan to attend BEARS 2015 lectures in the morning, register via the EECS BEARS Registration Page . If you are NOT attending the morning BEARS lectures but would like to h

ing the morning BEARS lectures but would like to have lunch and attend the Poster Session Open House in the DOP Center, please register via the TerraSwarm website. REGISTER HERE . Important: Only register one time, either through the EECS BEARS websi

ster one time, either through the EECS BEARS website OR through the TerraSwarm registration page. Do not register both places. The reason TerraSwarm has a separate registration is to ensure that everyone gets a lunch, including those who do not inten

one gets a lunch, including those who do not intend to participate in the other BEARS 2015 activities. Remember which site you registered on, as that will determine where you pick up your lunch (your name must be on the registrant list). Where to pic

name must be on the registrant list). Where to pick up your box lunch: If you registered via the EECS BEARS Registration website, pick up your box lunch outside Sibley Auditorium (in Bechtel Engineering Center) after the lectures conclude. If you reg

ng Center) after the lectures conclude. If you registered via the TerraSwarm website, pick up your box lunch in 540 A/B starting at 12:30pm. TerraSwarm Registration will close on February 5, 2015 so that we may get an accurate count for lunch. Furthe
